title: Task Receiving & Prompt Generation
description: Covers how the GEP agent receives tasks from the Hub/peers, scores and claims them, generates the evolution prompt, and produces proactive clarifying questions.

actors.name: GEP Evolution Cycle
actors.description: Orchestrator that drives the receive → select → claim → prompt → question loop

actors.name: Peer Agent
actors.description: Other agents sending/receiving messages via mailbox transport

actors.name: Post-Solidify Hook
actors.description: Caller that triggers urgent question generation after a failed solidify cycle

use_cases.name: Fetch Tasks from Hub
use_cases.description: POST /a2a/fetch with gep-a2a protocol message; returns available tasks plus optional questions_created and relevant_lessons from Hub

use_cases.name: Select Best Task
use_cases.description: Scores open tasks using composite formula (ROI + capability match + completion rate + bounty). Strategy configurable via TASK_STRATEGY env (greedy / balanced / conservative). Always resumes already-claimed task first.

use_cases.name: Estimate Capability Match
use_cases.description: Jaccard signal overlap × 40% + weighted success rate from MemoryGraph × 60%

use_cases.name: Score Task
use_cases.description: Applies strategy weights to roi/capability/completion/bounty factors. Normalises against reference maxima.

use_cases.name: Claim Task on Hub
use_cases.description: POST /a2a/task/claim. Deadline estimated via estimateCommitmentDeadline() from task difficulty.

use_cases.name: Complete Task on Hub
use_cases.description: POST /a2a/task/complete with result asset ID (sha256:... of published capsule)

use_cases.name: Claim & Complete Worker Pool Task
use_cases.description: Atomic claim+complete for /a2a/work/* endpoints. Called after solidify to avoid holding expiring assignments.

use_cases.name: Extract Signals from Task
use_cases.description: Converts task.signals CSV + title words into a signals array; adds external_task, bounty_task, and optionally privacy_computing / sealed_tool

use_cases.name: Detect Privacy / Sealed Computing Task
use_cases.description: Delegates to privacyClient.parsePrivacyParams(body) to extract sealed tool/blob references

use_cases.name: Generate GEP Evolution Prompt
use_cases.description: Builds the full Genome Evolution Protocol prompt string. Includes: protocol header, object model (Gene, Capsule, Mutation, PersonalityState, EvolutionEvent), constitutional ethics, cycleId, signals, hubMatchedBlock, recentHistory, hubLessons, strategyPolicy, capsule/gene/capability candidates.

use_cases.name: Generate Standard Proactive Questions
use_cases.method: generateQuestions(opts: { signals, recentEvents, sessionTranscript, memorySnippet }) → Question[]
use_cases.description: Rate-limited (≤1/30 min). Returns ≤3 highest-priority questions. Triggered by signals: recurring_error, capability_gap, evolution_saturation, consecutive_failure_streak_N (≥3), user_feature_request, perf_bottleneck, hub_search_miss_with_problem, repair_loop_detected, plateau_pivot_required/suggested.

use_cases.name: Generate Urgent Questions (Post-Solidify)
use_cases.description: Bypasses standard cooldown; separate 5-min rate limit. Returns ≤2 questions. Triggered by: validationFailed, lowConfidence, llmReviewRejected, zeroBlastRadius, taskCompletionFailed.

use_cases.name: Deduplicate & Rate-Limit Questions
use_cases.description: isDuplicate() uses word-overlap Jaccard (>0.7 = duplicate). State persisted in question_generator_state.json (lastAskedAt, lastUrgentAt, recentQuestions[30]).

use_cases.name: Piggyback Questions on Fetch Request
use_cases.description: Questions from generateQuestions() are embedded in the /a2a/fetch payload; Hub creates bounties from them. Response may include questions_created.

use_cases.name: Send Message via Mailbox
use_cases.description: Sends a typed A2A message via the local proxy. Routes through getProxyUrl().

use_cases.name: Receive Messages via Mailbox
use_cases.description: Polls mailbox for messages by type/channel. Used for peer task distribution.

use_cases.name: Register Mailbox Transport
use_cases.description: Registers the mailbox transport with a2aProtocol so other GEP modules can use it.

key_relationships: GEP Evolution Cycle uses taskReceiver to fetch, score, select, and claim tasks
taskReceiver.fetchTasks() piggybacked with questions from questionGenerator (UC12 extends UC1)
taskReceiver depends_on privacyClient (parsePrivacyParams) for sealed tasks
questionGenerator depends_on paths (getEvolutionDir) for state persistence
prompt.js (buildGepPrompt) is obfuscated; API recovered from test file; called by evolution cycle with signals + task context
generateUrgentQuestions triggered by Post-Solidify Hook, separate from standard cycle-start path
UC9 (generateQuestions) and UC10 (generateUrgentQuestions) both extend UC11 (deduplicate/rate-limit)
important_notes: prompt.js is a heavily obfuscated file; only the exported API (buildGepPrompt) is known from tests
TASK_STRATEGY env controls scoring weights: greedy (80% bounty), balanced (35% ROI + 30% cap), conservative (45% capability)
TASK_MIN_CAPABILITY_MATCH env (default 0.1) filters tasks below capability threshold
Commitment deadlines derived from difficulty: low→15min, medium→30min, high→60min, very_high→120min; capped at 5min–24h
Questions are typed { question: string, amount: number, signals: string[] }; amount always 0 (Hub sets bounty amount)
mailboxTransport communicates via a local HTTP proxy, not directly to Hub
